# Benoit Ardiet

> Freelance fintech .NET engineer in Quito, Ecuador (UTC-5, US Eastern hours). Payment API integrations, SQL Server performance rescue, legacy .NET modernization, Azure cost review, AI adoption for regulated teams. Works in English, French and Spanish.

Verified results: production deadlocks reduced 98% (288/month to about 4), P95 latency reduced 67% (1.56s to 512ms over 22.3M requests), Azure spend reduced 59% (invoice-verified), 37 payment-partner integrations migrated with parity verification.

Contact: benoitardiet@gmail.com

## Links

- [Home](https://benoitardiet.com/): positioning, services, evidence table and links to the case studies
- [SQL Server deadlocks](https://benoitardiet.com/work/sql-server-deadlocks): 288 deadlocks a month reduced to about four, using an Extended Events capture and Read Committed Snapshot Isolation
- [Money-transfer mobile app](https://benoitardiet.com/work/money-transfer-mobile-app): React Native app built solo, 35 screens in four languages, OIDC with PKCE, live on the App Store and Google Play
- [Redis out-of-memory outage](https://benoitardiet.com/work/redis-out-of-memory-outage): a twenty-minute total outage caused by a session store running out of memory, and why no alert fired
- [Cloudflare outage continuity](https://benoitardiet.com/work/cloudflare-outage-continuity): restoring service in under half an hour during the 18 November 2025 Cloudflare outage
- [Notes](https://benoitardiet.com/notes): writing on production systems that move money
